'''hohashaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:azerty|azerty]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-h-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:azerty|azerty]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| hohashaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || hohashithi || hohashiji || hohashishi || hohashiki
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || hohashuthu || hohashuju || hohashushu || hohashuku
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || hohashuthu || hohashuju || hohashushu || hohashuku
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || hohashufthuf || hohashufjuf || hohashufshuf || hohashufkuf
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || hohashethe || hohasheje || hohasheshe || hohasheke
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || hohashotho || hohashojo || hohashosho || hohashoko
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || hohashotho || hohashojo || hohashosho || hohashoko
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || hohashofthof || hohashofjof || hohashofshof || hohashofkof
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || hohashïfthïf || hohashïfjïf || hohashïfshïf || hohashïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || hohashïfthïf || hohashïfjïf || hohashïfshïf || hohashïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || hohashïfthïf || hohashïfjïf || hohashïfshïf || hohashïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || hohashïfthïf || hohashïfjïf || hohashïfshïf || hohashïfkïf
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || hohashæthæ || hohashæjæ || hohashæshæ || hohashækæ
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || hohashatha || hohashaja || hohashasha || hohashaka
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || hohashatha || hohashaja || hohashasha || hohashaka
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || hohashafthaf || hohashafjaf || hohashafshaf || hohashafkaf
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || hohashasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || hohashshëasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || hohashroasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || hohashmuasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || hohashyaasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gohohashnkshëasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gohohashnkroasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gohohashnkmuasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gohohashnkyaasha
|-
| [[comparative]].none || hohahashasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || hohahashshëasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || hohahashroasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || hohahashmuasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || hohahashyaasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gohohahashnkshëasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gohohahashnkroasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gohohahashnkmuasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gohohahashnkyaasha
|-
| [[superlative]].none || hehæshasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || hehæshshëasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || hehæshroasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || hehæshmuasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || hehæshyaasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gohehæshnkshëasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gohehæshnkroasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gohehæshnkmuasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gohehæshnkyaasha
|-
| [[negative]].none || hohfashasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || hohfashshëasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || hohfashroasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || hohfashmuasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || hohfashyaasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gohohfashnkshëasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gohohfashnkroasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gohohfashnkmuasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gohohfashnkyaasha
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
